mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_menu WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM tb_menu WHERE deleted = 0 AND (parent_id IS NULL OR parent_id = 0) ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM tb_menu WHERE deleted = 0 AND parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
